prompts.simple: What text is in this image?
prompts.transcribe: Transcribe the text in this image.
prompts.extract: Extract all text from this image exactly as written.
prompts.continue-reading:
Read and transcribe this ENTIRE page of text.
The document contains many lines - continue reading past the title.
Start at the top and do not stop until you reach the very last line.
Output all text exactly as written, preserving line breaks.
prompts.read-all: Read and output ALL text from this page, from top to bottom.
prompts.no-repeat: Transcribe this document. Output each line exactly once. Do not repeat any text.
prompts.line-by-line: List every line of text in this image, one per line.
prompts.direct: Output the exact text content of this document.
